_about: Curated rotation of public Reticulum TCP transport entrypoints, fetched by the web client at startup to prefill the TCP-connection daemon field. Mirrors the mobile app's KnownTcpNodes. Edit this file (no code change / deploy of app.js needed) — re-verify reachability and bump 'verified' when you do. The web client keeps a baked-in copy as an offline fallback, so a 404/parse error here is non-fatal. Only TCPClientInterface endpoints belong here — BackboneInterface uses a different wire protocol the WS-bridge can't speak. Many entries sourced from directory.rns.recipes.
